prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次依次为约 1129→1718→1404→1291→1252 名，整体呈波动中前移趋势。2021 年最低（1129），2022 年因扩招至 100 人位次后移至 1718，2023–2025 年逐步回升至 1252 附近，近 3 年累计前移约 466 名，2025 年基准约 1252 名；本省理科/物理类计划：2021 年 62 人、2022–2023 年 100 人、2024 年 95 人、2025 年 110 人；2026 年计划 110 人，与 2025 年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年主榜第 14 名（Top20），近年排名持续上升（2021 年第 19→2022 年第 18→2023 年第 16→2024 年第 14→2025 年第 13→2026 年第 14），稳居全国顶尖理工类高校前列；2026 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校舆情应对较为高效；抖音热度排名第 47/106（较热），短视频曝光量中等；历史投档异常记录中未见北理工明显断档信号，整体声誉对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估 A- 及以上共 12 个：信息与通信工程 A+、控制科学与工程 A+、机械工程 A、材料科学与工程 A、计算机科学与技术 A、光学工程 A、管理科学与工程 A、力学 A-、化学工程与技术 A-、工商管理 A-、数学 A-、物理学 A-，学科实力雄厚，对理工类考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北理工核心招生专业大类在 2026 年均为高热推荐/推荐，社会报考热度高；吉林省 2026 年普通高考总人数 110868 人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类合计约 111492 人）基本持平，物理类估算约 7.99 万人，竞争环境稳定；省控线数据 2025 年物理类本科批 340 分、特殊类型 479 分，近年变化不大，未纳入位次修正；北理工位于北京，非吉林省本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；吉林省招生人数占比较小（2025 年物理类 110 人），地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近年稳步前移、2026 年招生计划较2025年基准略有前移（竞争略缓和）、学校层次极高且排名持续上升、核心工科专业社会热度高、吉林省考生规模基本稳定等因素，在 2025 年基准 1252 名基础上预计位次保持稳定。预测最低位次约1239名，区间1096–1382名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 1129→1718→1404→1291→1252, showing a fluctuating but forward-moving trend. The lowest was in 2021 (1129), and in 2022 due to expansion to 100 students, the ranking moved back to 1718. From 2023 to 2025, it gradually recovered to around 1252, with a cumulative forward movement of about 466 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1252. Provincial Science/Physics Category plans: 62 in 2021, 100 in 2022–2023, 95 in 2024, 110 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 110, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 14th in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings (Top20), with a continuously rising ranking in recent years (19th in 2021→18th in 2022→16th in 2023→14th in 2024→13th in 2025→14th in 2026), firmly among the top-tier science and engineering universities nationwide. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (such as the Gong Lin incident), but the university's public relations response has been relatively efficient. Douyin popularity ranking: 47/106 (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. No obvious signs of score gaps in historical admission anomaly records for BIT. Overall reputation has a limited impact on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Optical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Business Administration A-, Mathematics A-, Physics A-. The strong disciplinary strength attracts science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core enrollment majors at BIT, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, are all highly recommended/recommended for 2026, with high social application enthusiasm. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Jilin Province is 110,868, basically unchanged from 2025 (History Category + Physics Category total approximately 111,492), with Physics Category estimated at about 79,900, indicating a stable competitive environment. Provincial control score data: 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch 340 points, special type 479 points, with little change in recent years, not included in ranking adjustments. BIT is located in Beijing, not a local university in Jilin Province, with no local enrollment preference. The proportion of enrollment in Jilin Province is small (110 in Physics Category in 2025), so regional preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the steady forward movement of historical rankings in recent years, the 2026 enrollment plan slightly forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly eased), the extremely high university level with continuously rising rankings, high social popularity of core engineering majors, and basically stable number of candidates in Jilin Province, the ranking is expected to remain stable based on the 2025 baseline of 1252. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1239, with a range of 1096–1382.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical and Electrical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Including Digital Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1096–1382, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choices (Intelligent Manufacturing, Information Science and Technology, Electronic Information Experimental Class, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Excellence Class, Future Precision Engineering, Xu Teli Elite Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Science and Materials Elite Class, Economics and Management Experimental Class) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1109), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年文科/历史类最低位次依次为约 575→3349→559→606→410 名。2022 年因文科计划调整（10 人）出现异常后移至 3349，其余年份在 410–606 区间波动；2025 年基准约 410 名，为近年最优（位次数字最小），较 2024 年（606）前移约 196 名；本省文科/历史类计划：2021 年 12 人、2022 年 10 人、2023 年 5 人、2024 年 15 人、2025 年 5 人；2026 年计划 7 人，较 2025 年扩招 2 人（+40%），扩招幅度较大，预计竞争略有缓解，位次可能小幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年主榜第 14 名，虽以理工见长，但整体层次极高，对文科考生同样具有品牌吸引力；2026 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，但主要涉及理工科院系事件，对文科招生影响有限；抖音热度排名第 47/106（较热），整体关注度中等；北理工文科相关学科：工商管理 A-、管理科学与工程 A，社会科学试验班涵盖法学、经济学、工商管理等方向，学科评估等级良好。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度推荐、金融/财经/经济分化观望、会计/财务/审计推荐，文科类专业整体热度中等偏上；吉林省 2026 年历史类考生估算约 3.09 万人，与 2025 年（31071 人）基本持平；省控线 2025 年历史类本科批 384 分、特殊类型 493 分，近年变化不大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅前移（410）已达历史高位、2026 年计划扩招 40% 使竞争略有缓解、学校层次极高但文科招生量极小（5–7 人）位次波动大等因素。预测最低位次约518名，区间459–577名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 575, 3349, 559, 606, and 410 respectively. In 2022, due to an adjustment in liberal arts enrollment plan (10 students), there was an anomaly shifting to 3349; other years fluctuated within the 410–606 range. The baseline for 2025 is about 410, the best in recent years (smallest ranking number), moving forward by about 196 places compared to 2024 (606). Provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans: 2021: 12 students, 2022: 10 students, 2023: 5 students, 2024: 15 students, 2025: 5 students; 2026 plan: 7 students, an increase of 2 students (+40%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, expected to slightly ease competition, with rankings possibly shifting backward slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class university; ranked 14th in the main list of the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings. Although strong in science and engineering, its overall level is extremely high, also attracting liberal arts candidates with brand appeal. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, but mainly involves incidents in science and engineering departments, with limited impact on liberal arts enrollment. Douyin popularity ranking: 47/106 (relatively hot), overall attention moderate. BIT's liberal arts-related disciplines: Business Administration A-, Management Science and Engineering A, Social Science Experimental Class covering law, economics, business administration, etc., with good discipline evaluation grades.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially recommended, finance/economics differentiation is wait-and-see, accounting/auditing/finance is recommended; overall popularity of liberal arts majors is moderately high. In Jilin Province, the estimated number of history category candidates for 2026 is about 30,900, roughly the same as 2025 (31,071). Provincial control line for 2025 history category undergraduate batch: 384 points, special type: 493 points, with little change in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward shift in 2025 ranking (410) reaching a historical high, the 40% enrollment expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, the extremely high university level but very small liberal arts enrollment (5–7 students) causing large ranking fluctuations, etc. The predicted minimum ranking is about 518, with a range of 459–577.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences Direction) (Law, Social Work, English, Japanese, German, Spanish, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (BIT only offers one major group in Jilin Province liberal arts, with two directions under the same Social Science Experimental Class category)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics Direction) (Business Administration, Economics, International Economics and Trade, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: BIT only offers one major category, Social Science Experimental Class (including Humanities and Social Sciences Direction and Management and Economics Direction) in Jilin Province liberal arts. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 459–577 can apply. The Humanities and Social Sciences Direction has historically better rankings (2025: 348), while the Management and Economics Direction is relatively looser (2025: 410). Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit can prioritize the Humanities and Social Sciences Direction (including law), while those near the upper limit can focus on the Management and Economics Direction.
